title: Native Config Overlay: Six Security Gates

blocks.text: Security gates are ordered by decision point. Each gate decides only; the caller executes the consequence.

rows: task surfaces, runtime capability/trust tier, policy bundle
tool, args, runtime tier, policy bundle
path, kind, diff, protected paths, sandbox

items: Gates decide only. The calling context executes the consequence.
Every implemented gate decision is persisted as IR/audit evidence.
Changing an existing gate responsibility is `change:breaking-policy`.

blocks.text: The current executable subset is anchored by tool start/approval gates, session fail-closed blocking, policy violation audit append, and store-channel policy checks.
